cleavage agent: Trypsin was added to a final concentration of 1:25-1:100 enzyme:protein
fragmentation method: collision-induced dissociation fragmentation spectrum acquisition (MS2) (HCD, collisionEnergy=28.0)
instrument: tandem mass spectrometry on a Thermo Q Exactive HF
ionization type: followed by nano electrospray-ionization and tandem mass spectrometry
labeling: we performed label-free quantification (LFQ) using Fragpipe
